fonts.heading: Outfit, sans-serif
fonts.notes: Outfit for strong, clean headers; IBM Plex Sans for dense data and tabular readability. No Inter.

spacing_and_layout.app_structure: Sidebar navigation (w-64, fixed) + Top Header (h-16, sticky) + Main Content Area
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid. Dashboard top-level metrics in grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6.
spacing_and_layout.card_style: Flat solid surfaces. rounded-xl, border border-slate-200, bg-white, shadow-sm.

components.buttons: rounded-lg font-medium px-4 py-2 transition-colors duration-200. Primary: bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700. Secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50.
components.tables: Dense layout. border-collapse. th: text-xs font-semibold tracking-wider uppercase text-slate-500 bg-slate-50. td: text-sm text-slate-700 border-b border-slate-100.
components.badges: rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium border

image_urls.description: Professional headshot for the logged-in user avatar in the header

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a sidebar layout with links for Dashboard, Upload, Exceptions, IMS Actions, Compliance Preview, and Interest Estimator.
Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide React for UI iconography. Lucide is default and perfectly fine.
Dashboard must include 3-4 top cards (e.g., ITC claimed, Outward supplies, Deadlines) followed by recent uploads or exception summaries.
Dropzone should have a dashed border, light background tint, and an active state on drag over.
Exception Ledger should be a dense data table allowing inline edits (mocked if necessary) with clear red/green status badges.
IMS Action Tracker should feature Accept/Reject/Pending buttons per row, with ITC impact preview (delta).
Compliance Preview must show a split view (GSTR-1 and GSTR-3B) with drill-down mock interactions.
Interest Estimator needs an input form (Due Date, Actual Date, ECL Balance) computing the interest.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements like buttons, inputs, tabs, and table rows.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Import and use 'Outfit' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body.
